title: No Sun
description: A simple mod that removes the sun from the Overworld.
body:
# No Sun

A simple mod that removes the sun from the Overworld.

# Description

*Lights out.*

This mod removes the sun from the sky – unlike other "permanent night" mods, it preserves the normal day/night cycle... or shall we say, the cycle of "moonlit nights" and "moonless nights"?

This unique "permanent night" ensures time-related mechanics (both vanilla and modded) function correctly, and feels less eerie than other "permanent night" solutions... at least you can still feel the passage of time.

Of course, you can disable the mod's functionality using the game rule: `disableNoSun`.

# License

This mod is open-source under the GPL v3.0 License.

You may include it in your modpacks/servers as long as you **comply with the license terms**.
